name: assets-2d
description: Curated CC0 2D asset sources and AI sprite-sheet pipelines for game-view lectures. Skill-only — no runtime deps. Teaches where to find sprites, how to generate them, and lesson folder conventions (public/assets/sprites/, public/assets/backgrounds/).

skill.loadWhen: the lesson needs 2D sprites, tilesets, or backgrounds for a game-view scene — sourcing CC0 art or generating sprite sheets
